calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-19-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Cherese T.D. Logan was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Darius Marshawn Mayfield.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Dajuan Mayfield, the minor's father, was present in pro per, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication in the file.

After hearing oral statements from petitioner and the minor's father, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to: Darius Marshawn Heckard.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-05-2010 Reset To Aug-19-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr., Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioner Cherese Logan was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Darius Marshwan Mayfield.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Service in the file.

The Court cannot proceed with today's hearing as there is no indication in the case file that the minor's father was given notice of the proposed name change.

Good cause appearing, this matter is continued to August 19, 2010 @ 9:00 a.m. in Department 218 for further hearing on the proposed name change.
